# Berri Field

**Summary**: An offshore field in Saudi Arabia containing the Hanifa Reservoir.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2001]] focused on a sector of the Berri field for 3D modeling.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2001-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2001]] Offshore field

## Formations Present

- [[2001-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2001]] hanifa-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study area within the Berri field contains 97 wells and has been mapped using 3-D seismic data. ([[2001-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2001, p. 21]])
